userMessage:
Set up I2C decode on B1 clock CH1 data CH2, 
   trigger on address 0x48 write

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Built a server-side common TekAutomate flow.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"bef74ef3-972e-4c3b-955c-32e1ba927065","newStep":{"id":"1","type":"group","label":"Configure B1 I2C decode","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"1_1","type":"write","label":"Configure B1 I2C decode (1/2)","params":{"command":"BUS:ADDNew \"I2C\";BUS:B1:I2C:CLOCk:SOUrce CH1;BUS:B1:I2C:DATa:SOUrce CH2"}},{"id":"1_2","type":"write","label":"Configure B1 I2C decode (2/2)","params":{"command":"DISplay:WAVEView1:BUS:B1:STATE ON"}}]}}]}
